warnings: sum(f+) = 1.0000 (should be ~1.0; large drift suggests an N\u00b11 state did not converge)
sum(f-) = 1.0000 (should be ~1.0; large drift suggests an N\u00b11 state did not converge)

prose:
Fukui reactivity analysis was performed on nitrobenzene using DFT, tier `standard` (**B3LYP/def2-TZVP**, density-fit) in PySCF, in the **gas phase**, with charge 0 and multiplicity 1. The geometry was provided by the user via `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/nitrobenzene/nitrobenzene.xyz` and used as-is for this single-point calculation.

The calculation converged successfully. The most **electrophilic** site (attack by a nucleophile) is Carbon at atom index 3 (1-based atom label 4) with a Fukui `f+` index of **0.4964**. The most **nucleophilic** site (attack by an electrophile) is Carbon at atom index 4 (1-based atom label 5) with a Fukui `f-` index of **0.1073**.

The full result, including all per-atom Fukui indices, can be found in `nitrobenzene_fukui_reactivity.json`. A visual representation is available in `agent_call_01_plot.png`.
